report.summary: Cycle 3 standup (Mar 28 late). BTC $66,000–$66,194 (flat, $66K support still holding). ETH ~$1,985 (sub-$2K day 3+). F&G 12 (Extreme Fear, 49+ day streak). KEY DELTA: Bitcoin ETF 4-week inflow streak broken — $296M weekly outflows, $225.6M single-day outflow Mar 27 led by BlackRock IBIT ($201.7M). Uncommitted files rose to 286 (+13 from cycle 2). All 6 agents completed cycle 2 — 2 new learn guides (Solana LST, RWA vs DeFi Yield), 2 OG images, 3 tweets, Newsletter v36, SVG social card. Deploy remains P0 for 13th consecutive cycle.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,000–$66,194. Flat since cycle 2 standup. Testing $66K support for 3rd day. Down 24.6% YTD, 48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). 28% below 200-day SMA. Iran/geopolitical tensions remain primary macro headwind.
ETH: ~$1,985, down 4.05% on the day. Sub-$2K for 3rd+ consecutive day. ETH/BTC at 0.0301 (lowest since Feb 2024). $253M mystery whale accumulation since Mar 1 continues.
F&G INDEX: 12 (Extreme Fear). 49+ consecutive days — approaching longest streak since post-FTX Oct 2022. Volume contracted 18% to $95.99B (below 30-day avg $108B) — exhaustion not panic selling.

ETF FLOWS — KEY DELTA: Bitcoin ETF 4-week inflow streak BROKEN. $296M weekly outflows. Mar 27 saw $225.6M single-day outflow: BlackRock IBIT -$201.67M, Bitwise BITB -$18.60M, Ark ARKB -$5.35M. Capital 'avoiding directional risk' — not selling conviction but refusing new exposure until geopolitical clarity. March total flows now negative.

SEC ETF RULING (Mar 27 aftermath): Results still trickling. XRP spot ETFs live ($1.44B cumulative). SOL/LTC staking ETFs trading. 16 tokens classified as digital commodities (Mar 17). No major new approvals announced in last cycle. $13.5B BTC+ETH options expired on Deribit (largest quarterly settlement of 2026).

DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE (standup-v2): BTC stable ($66K range unchanged). ETH dipped slightly ($1,997→$1,985). F&G unchanged at 12. MAJOR: ETF outflow data now confirmed — sentiment shift from 'cautious inflows' to 'active withdrawal'. Uncommitted files 273→286 (+13 from build + design cycles). No new commits. No new pages deployed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 3 OF MARCH 28. Two full rotations (all 6 agents each) completed today. This standup opens cycle 3. 11 total agent runs so far today (3 standups, 1 build, 1 publish, 2 designs, 2 community, 2 eod).

WHAT SHIPPED IN CYCLE 2: 2 new learn guides (Solana LST Comparison: Marinade vs Jito vs Sanctum, RWA Yield vs DeFi Yield Comparison) with full SEO + FAQ schemas. 2 OG images (LST comparison, RWA vs DeFi yield). UX responsive fixes on both pages (clamp headings, touch targets, table padding). 3 tweets drafted (#217-219: fear streak record, ETH undervalued thread, Monday tool spotlight). Newsletter v36 weekly digest. 1 SVG social card (fear streak record).

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (UNCHANGED): (1) Deploy — 286 uncommitted files (+13 from cycle 2), 13th cycle flagging P0. (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (81.6% coverage). (4) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking). (5) 17 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (cosmetic). (6) Full build OOM in VM — Vercel CI untested.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25 batch deploy). 286 files pending (was 273 at cycle 2 standup). All changes additive — no destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 577 live (unchanged since cycle 1 promotion of Citrea + Unichain). Content velocity: ~4 pages/day average this week. Total content drafted: 219 tweets, 36 newsletter versions, 48+ SVG social cards.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 13th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 286 uncommitted files. Now spans 3 days and 11+ agent runs. Every learn page, OG image, UX fix from 50+ agent runs is invisible to production. Google cannot index. The ETF outflow reversal makes timely content even more critical — our ETF guides need to reflect current sentiment. Jefe: one git commit + push unlocks everything. 5-minute action, highest leverage possible.

PRIORITY 2 — ETF OUTFLOW REVERSAL CONTENT [NEW, TIME-SENSITIVE]: The 4-week inflow streak breaking is a major narrative shift. Build: 'Bitcoin ETF Outflows: What Happened March 2026', 'BlackRock IBIT Sees Largest Single-Day Outflow', 'Are Institutions Selling Bitcoin?'. This is fresh search intent — few competitors have published yet. Our ETF guide is already a top performer — extend it.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR RECORD + OPTIONS EXPIRY: F&G at 12 for 49+ days approaching all-time record streak. $13.5B options just expired (largest quarterly of 2026). Combined with whale accumulation divergence (270K BTC + $253M ETH), this creates powerful 'smart money vs retail panic' narrative. Build reactive content and amplify through social channels (tweets #217-219 already queued).
